title: The Biggest Shift in Business Since the Internet Just Happened
summary: Liam Ottley describes a five-layer AI Operating System (AIOS) architecture for automating entire business operations without code. The system integrates business data (CRM, analytics, revenue), deploys automations (proposals, reporting, content follow-ups), and unifies data across multiple companies, built on Cloud Code and tested across agencies, media, education, and SaaS.
